name: Wireless Headphones

description: Soft 100% organic cotton crew neck t-shirt. Available in multiple colors.

description: Feature-packed smartwatch with heart rate monitoring, GPS, and 5-day battery life.

description: Extra-thick non-slip yoga mat with carrying strap. Eco-friendly TPE material.

description: 12-cup programmable drip coffee maker with thermal carafe and auto shut-off.

description: Lightweight breathable running shoes with responsive cushioning and durable outsole.

description: Adjustable LED desk lamp with multiple brightness levels and color temperatures.

description: Classic denim jacket with button closure and chest pockets. Timeless style.

description: Durable 40L travel backpack with padded laptop compartment, multiple pockets, and water-resistant fabric.

name: Stainless Steel Tumbler
description: 30 oz insulated tumbler with spill-proof lid. Perfect for coffee, smoothies, and iced drinks.
